# citation2000 Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "citation2000" {
    folder_path = "/workspaces/go-tf-provider-lab/myquotes"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `folder_path` (String) Path of the folder containing the json files
